channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Daily Zimbabwe Weather + Tsumo
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Zimbabwe's main cities plus the Tsumo yezuva (proverb of the day). One item per day, dedicated for the Mutapa Times weather autolist.

item.title: Zim weather 14 May: Harare overcast · high 27° / low 16°
item.description: Harare: high 27°, low 16° (overcast) · Bulawayo: high 27°, low 15° (clear sky) · Mutare: high 27°, low 16° (overcast) · Gweru: high 26°, low 15° (mainly clear) · Masvingo: high 27°, low 15° (clear sky) · Victoria Falls: high 30°, low 16° (mainly clear) Tsumo yezuva: Kudzidza hakuperi. (Learning never ends.) #Zimbabwe #Weather #ZimbabweWeather #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
